title: 校园媒体观察周
summary: 本周会认识新字 的、点、脑、视、影，再复习 本、杯、京。我们会围绕电脑、电视、电影和校园任务，学习怎样查资料、表达看法、讨论周末计划。

char_cards.meaning: of; structural particle: used before a noun, linking it to preceding possessive or descriptive attributive

drop (of liquid); stain; spot; speck; jot; dot stroke (in Chinese characters); decimal point; point; mark (of degree or level); a place (with certain characteristics); iron bell; o’clock; a little; a bit; some; (point) unit of measurement for type; to touch on briefly; to make clear; to light; to ignite; to kindle; period of time at night (24 minutes) (old); a drip; to dibble; classifier for small indeterminate quantities

char_cards.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men xué xí “ diàn nǎo ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ diàn shì ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ diàn yǐng ”。

char_cards.meaning: roots or stems of plants; origin; source; this; the current; root; foundation; basis; classifier for books, periodicals, files etc; originally

char_cards.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men xué xí “ bēi zǐ ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ běi jīng ”。

sentences.pinyin_text: wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。

sentences.text: 教室里的电视正在播放新闻。
sentences.pinyin_text: jiào shì lǐ de diàn shì zhèng zài bō fàng xīn wén。
sentences.audio_text: 教室里的电视正在播放新闻。

sentences.text: 这部电影对我们有一点儿影响。
sentences.pinyin_text: zhè bù diàn yǐng duì wǒ men yǒu yī diǎn ér yǐng xiǎng。
sentences.audio_text: 这部电影对我们有一点儿影响。

sentences.text: 请在地图上点一下北京。
sentences.pinyin_text: qǐng zài de tú shàng diǎn yī xià běi jīng。
sentences.audio_text: 请在地图上点一下北京。

story.title: 查资料
story.pinyin_text: wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。
story.dialogue_pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。
story.image_prompt:
Create a storybook-style learning illustration for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters.
Scene goal: 我想用电脑查资料。
Scene type: 课堂互动
Location: 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂
Focus characters: 脑、本、点
Focus words: 电脑、本子
Visual direction:
- Use soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters, and an age-appropriate atmosphere for learners around ages 9-13.
- Build a grounded educational scene connected to real Chinese learning moments such as classroom discussion, home routines, reading, greeting, helping, planning, travel, or going out.
- Include meaningful props related to Chinese learning, such as books, chalkboard, toys, flowers, bags, tables, cups, or other scene-appropriate objects.
- Keep the layout clean and stable, suitable for a modern learning page or printable study material.
Composition:
- One clear main action, readable background, strong focal point, and enough empty space for later educational text layout.
- Make the illustration feel polished, warm, and visually consistent with the Fun Hanzi style, without looking like preschool material.
IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT generate any Chinese characters, pinyin, letters, or text in the image.
- Leave empty space where educational text can be added later.
- Hanzi and pinyin planning notes belong in the separate text layout, not inside the image.
- If any visible text is produced by mistake, it must be treated as an error and regenerated.
story.video_prompt:
Create an educational micro-story video for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: 10-15 second school-age micro-story clip, gentle camera move, warm realistic lighting, clear staging, simple shot rhythm, vivid everyday setting.
Scene title: 查资料
Learning goal: 我想用电脑查资料。
Real-life setting: 课堂互动 / 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂
Character relationship: 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
Focus characters: 脑、本、点
Focus words: 电脑、本子
Fixed spoken line: 我想用电脑查资料。
Reference pinyin for production only: wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。
Story direction: Build a school-age learning micro-story instead of a dry teaching clip. Use a believable 课堂互动 in 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂. Show 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答. Let 电脑、本子 and the focus characters 脑、本、点 appear through a tiny real-life event. The story must contain a setup, a small task or question, a response, and a warm ending. Keep the tone suitable for learners around ages 9-13, a little more mature and grounded than preschool material. Make the spoken line feel natural and land clearly on “我想用电脑查资料。”.
Story structure:
- Opening: establish a real place and a clear student activity.
- Middle beat: introduce one small task, question, or discovery connected to the target words.
- Speaking beat: let the character say the fixed line naturally in context.
- Ending: give a warm response or tiny success moment.
Visual direction:
- Keep the action grounded in family life, classroom life, going out, greeting, helping, reading, planning, traveling, or welcoming someone.
- Use clear staging, readable props, gentle motion, and one main action per shot.
- Keep the same characters, costume, and mood consistent with the matching image.
Text and subtitle rules:
- Reference these exact pinyin spellings for production planning and script checking only: 脑 -> nǎo; 本 -> běn; 点 -> diǎn. Keep these exact Hanzi+pinyin pairs in your notes: 脑 nǎo | 本 běn | 点 diǎn.
- Use the fixed spoken line provided in the script. Reference pinyin for production only: wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。. Do not generate pinyin subtitles inside the video; the learning page will show the exact teaching pinyin separately.
- If text appears on screen, prefer Hanzi only and avoid auto-generated pinyin subtitles.
- Hanzi writing and pinyin spelling must be absolutely correct; do not invent, simplify, misspell, or place tone marks on the wrong vowel.
Quality bar:
- Avoid flashcard-style pointing at words.
- Avoid empty backgrounds or generic stock actions.
- Make the moment feel believable, warm, story-led, and useful for a child learner.
story.video_script:
场景：查资料
视频类型：课堂互动
真实场合：小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂
人物关系：老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
固定台词：我想用电脑查资料。
参考拼音：wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。
目标字：脑、本、点
剧情结构：先交代一个真实小场景，再出现一个小问题或小任务，接着通过人物互动自然说出台词，最后温暖收尾。
镜头1：建立真实场景，让学生一眼看懂人物在做什么，并为“我想用电脑查资料。”做铺垫。
镜头2：出现一个具体动作或小问题，把目标字 脑、本、点 藏在物件、地点、任务或人物反应里，不要像生硬教学演示。
镜头3：角色在情境里自然说出固定台词“我想用电脑查资料。”，嘴型清楚，情绪真实，动作和台词有关联。
镜头4：给出回应或结果，例如同学反馈、老师确认、家人回应、任务完成，让学习者感觉这个句子在真实生活里有用。
镜头5：收尾停留 1-2 秒，保持画面温暖、真实、易懂，但不要过于幼态。
字幕策略：视频里不强制加入拼音字幕，拼音会由学习页面单独展示；如需字幕，只保留汉字即可。

本
běn
点
diǎn

【教学标签】
脑 nǎo | 本 běn | 点 diǎn

Create a storybook-style learning illustration for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters.
Scene goal: 我们想看一部电影，晚一点儿再出发。
Scene type: 课堂互动

Focus words: 电影、一点儿

- Use soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters, and an age-appropriate atmosphere for learners around ages 9-13.
- Build a grounded educational scene connected to real Chinese learning moments such as classroom discussion, home routines, reading, greeting, helping, planning, travel, or going out.
- Include meaningful props related to Chinese learning, such as books, chalkboard, toys, flowers, bags, tables, cups, or other scene-appropriate objects.
- Keep the layout clean and stable, suitable for a modern learning page or printable study material.
Composition:
- One clear main action, readable background, strong focal point, and enough empty space for later educational text layout.
- Make the illustration feel polished, warm, and visually consistent with the Fun Hanzi style, without looking like preschool material.

- Leave empty space where educational text can be added later.

video_tasks.prompt:
Create an educational micro-story video for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: 10-15 second school-age micro-story clip, gentle camera move, warm realistic lighting, clear staging, simple shot rhythm, vivid everyday setting.
Scene title: 查资料
Learning goal: 我想用电脑查资料。
Real-life setting: 课堂互动 / 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂
Character relationship: 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
Focus characters: 脑、本、点
Focus words: 电脑、本子
Fixed spoken line: 我想用电脑查资料。
Reference pinyin for production only: wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。
Story direction: Build a school-age learning micro-story instead of a dry teaching clip. Use a believable 课堂互动 in 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂. Show 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答. Let 电脑、本子 and the focus characters 脑、本、点 appear through a tiny real-life event. The story must contain a setup, a small task or question, a response, and a warm ending. Keep the tone suitable for learners around ages 9-13, a little more mature and grounded than preschool material. Make the spoken line feel natural and land clearly on “我想用电脑查资料。”.
Story structure:
- Opening: establish a real place and a clear student activity.
- Middle beat: introduce one small task, question, or discovery connected to the target words.
- Speaking beat: let the character say the fixed line naturally in context.
- Ending: give a warm response or tiny success moment.
Visual direction:
- Keep the action grounded in family life, classroom life, going out, greeting, helping, reading, planning, traveling, or welcoming someone.
- Use clear staging, readable props, gentle motion, and one main action per shot.
- Keep the same characters, costume, and mood consistent with the matching image.
Text and subtitle rules:
- Reference these exact pinyin spellings for production planning and script checking only: 脑 -> nǎo; 本 -> běn; 点 -> diǎn. Keep these exact Hanzi+pinyin pairs in your notes: 脑 nǎo | 本 běn | 点 diǎn.
- Use the fixed spoken line provided in the script. Reference pinyin for production only: wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。. Do not generate pinyin subtitles inside the video; the learning page will show the exact teaching pinyin separately.
- If text appears on screen, prefer Hanzi only and avoid auto-generated pinyin subtitles.
- Hanzi writing and pinyin spelling must be absolutely correct; do not invent, simplify, misspell, or place tone marks on the wrong vowel.
Quality bar:
- Avoid flashcard-style pointing at words.
- Avoid empty backgrounds or generic stock actions.
- Make the moment feel believable, warm, story-led, and useful for a child learner.

video_storyboard.script:
场景：查资料
视频类型：课堂互动
真实场合：小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂
人物关系：老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
固定台词：我想用电脑查资料。
参考拼音：wǒ xiǎng yòng diàn nǎo chá zī liào。
目标字：脑、本、点
剧情结构：先交代一个真实小场景，再出现一个小问题或小任务，接着通过人物互动自然说出台词，最后温暖收尾。
镜头1：建立真实场景，让学生一眼看懂人物在做什么，并为“我想用电脑查资料。”做铺垫。
镜头2：出现一个具体动作或小问题，把目标字 脑、本、点 藏在物件、地点、任务或人物反应里，不要像生硬教学演示。
镜头3：角色在情境里自然说出固定台词“我想用电脑查资料。”，嘴型清楚，情绪真实，动作和台词有关联。
镜头4：给出回应或结果，例如同学反馈、老师确认、家人回应、任务完成，让学习者感觉这个句子在真实生活里有用。
镜头5：收尾停留 1-2 秒，保持画面温暖、真实、易懂，但不要过于幼态。
字幕策略：视频里不强制加入拼音字幕，拼音会由学习页面单独展示；如需字幕，只保留汉字即可。

audio_tasks.text: 教室里的电视正在播放新闻。
这部电影对我们有一点儿影响。
请在地图上点一下北京。
教室里的电视正在播放北京新闻。
我们想看一部电影，晚一点儿再出发。
